title: What a man of God actually does with temptation
caption:
A godly man doesn't white-knuckle temptation. He flees it.

Scripture doesn't call you to grit your teeth and resist harder. It calls you to move. "Flee youthful passions." — 2 Timothy 2:22. Joseph ran from Potiphar's wife. He didn't talk himself out of it. He moved his body out of the room.

Willpower is a finite resource. It runs out. But a man who removes himself from the room, who fills the slot with something that actually competes — the Word, the iron, two brothers who know his name — that man is making moves Scripture actually endorses.

And the thing you're keeping in the dark still has power over you. The thing you say out loud to a brother starts to die. "Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16.

One man. This week. Specific. That's it.

Save this for the moment the pull comes back.

#faith #christianmen #temptation #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #purity #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
